title: 2023 DPA Survey Overview & Demographics
summary: The inaugural 2023 Design Pay Asia survey captured 323 responses from designers across Southeast Asia between December 2022 and February 2023. Singapore led with 224 responses (69.4%), followed by Malaysia (46, 14.2%) and Indonesia (29, 8.9%). Gender distribution was nearly equal with 54.5% women and 43.9% men. The majority of respondents were under 35 years old, with 43% in the 25-30 age bracket. Respondents from 9 additional countries also participated in smaller numbers.
methodology: Anonymous voluntary online survey distributed through design community channels, social media, and design organisations. Self-reported data collected via Tally.so form.
